reason: Detected a management-system scope with multiple business modules, RBAC, approval workflows, reporting, audit trails, and system configuration. The project should be planned as epics first instead of being compressed into a single 8-12 sprint list.

epics.title: Identity, organizations, and RBAC
epics.boundary: User identity, organization structure, roles, permissions, and access policy enforcement. Excludes business workflow screens.
risks: role model too coarse for later workflows

epics.title: Core workflow and approvals
epics.boundary: Primary business records, lifecycle states, approval routing, and rejection/resubmission flows.
risks: approval edge cases hidden in prose
